A crafted xlsx or pptx document placed in an indexed directory can cause local files to be read or outbound HTTP requests to be performed, with the retrieved content being written to the search index. This has been patched in versions 7.0.1, 6.6.1, 5.6.2 and 4.6.7.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00301, "percentile": 0.2159}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-fq39-62gx-8hqx", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-29T17:32:26Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fq39-62gx-8hqx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-fq39-62gx-8hqx"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-46722"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-19T10:16:25Z", "published_at": "2026-05-19T12:31:39Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-46722", "https://typo3.org/security/advisory/typo3-ext-sa-2026-011", "https://github.com/FriendsOfPHP/security-advisories/blob/master/tpwd/ke_search/CVE-2026-46722.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fq39-62gx-8hqx"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/tpwd/ke_search", "summary": "TYPO3 ke_search XML External Entity Injection", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-29T17:32:28Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-fq39-62gx-8hqx", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "7.0.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "tpwd/ke_search"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 7.0.0, < 7.0.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "6.6.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "tpwd/ke_search"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 6.0.0, < 6.6.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "5.6.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "tpwd/ke_search"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 5.0.0, < 5.6.2"}, {"first_patched_version": "4.6.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "tpwd/ke_search"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 4.6.7"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
